verdicts.reason: bakery display with peanut butter and double chocolate cookies, neither is the cocoa+cornflake Afghan biscuit
raw cauliflower florets on a board, not the air-fried steaks
hands holding whole raw courgettes outdoors, not breaded fries
raw cubed tofu with spring onion, no air-fried golden crust
raw seasoned pork mince in a bowl with chopped garlic, not the finished meatballs in tomato sauce
macro of fresh strawberries only, ambrosia is a marshmallow + pineapple + coconut creamy salad
dry rolled oats in a bowl, no porridge, no apple, no cinnamon
whole apple on a tree, not chutney
Vietnamese chicken pho with bean sprouts and Thai basil — Greek avgolemono is a lemon-egg soup, completely different cuisine
spaghetti pasta + bacon + eggs ingredient flat-lay, no spaghetti squash and no fritters
sliced raw mushrooms on white surface, completely off-topic
baked vanilla cheesecake slice with golden top and biscuit base, hero composition (the Biscoff biscuit on top is a topping not a watermark)
fresh banana slices with cashews and dry oats, not banana bread and not overnight oats in a jar
oatmeal bowl with fruit and a coffee mug, smoothie is a drink in a glass — wrong format
bowl of raw raisins/sultanas, not the loaf cake
macro of an almond-topped sponge, no pink/yellow checkerboard and no marzipan
cooked steak (ribeye / T-bone) on rocket, not pork ribs
beef chunks stir-fried with red onion and peppers, no creamy mushroom sauce that defines stroganoff
four whole raw beetroots on a board, not a plated salad with feta and walnuts
dried/freeze-dried berries scattered with a stone, no liquid and no glass — wrong format for a smoothie
raw cuts of pork (belly, loin, mince) on a board, hunter's stew should be a finished braise with cabbage and sausage
raw pork cuts on a dark board, blanquette is a white veal stew in cream sauce — wrong meat and wrong format
tea cup with cream-filled jammy/shortbread biscuits, not the rectangular chocolate sandwich biscuits
composition dominated by two bowls of soup and bread, dill pickle jar visible but bread-and-butter pickles are sweet sliced cucumber, not whole dill pickles
two baguettes with a small glass of milk, no sauce in sight
pile of flour with wheat stalks and a wooden scoop, raw-ingredient shot
baked brownies with piped chocolate frosting on a pink plate, brownie batter bites are no-bake balls/truffles — wrong format
googly-eyed potatoes being mashed, comedy stock photo unusable as an editorial hero
crispy fried chicken pieces in a serving dish, correct dish and format, hero-worthy
tagliatelle with black truffle being shaved over the plate, cacio e pepe is pecorino + black pepper — wrong dish entirely (truffle pasta)
chocolate-coated caramelised biscuit truffles on a yellow background, right dish, hero composition
olives on a spoon with olive oil dripping, completely off-topic
